description: Supported locales, URL routing, and toggle configuration. build.py and validate.py read from here instead of hardcoding en-CA / fr-CA strings. To add a locale, add an entry to 'locales', set status to 'planned' until content reaches parity, and wire the URL prefix into build.py in the same commit.

toggle.description: The language toggle is a plain <a href> pointing at /{url_prefix}/<same-path>. Server-rendered. The hreflang attribute on the link tells screen readers and search engines. toggle_label shows the language you will switch TO, not the current language.
toggle.fallback_behaviour: When a fr-CA field is null, build.py falls back to en-CA content and renders an ai_translated notice if ai_translated is true for that record.

notes: Add future locales (e.g. Plains Cree iy-CA, Inuktitut iu-CA) with status 'planned' until content and validation tooling reach parity. BCP-47 tags follow IETF RFC 5646.
